task_objective: Remove leftover Decky template migration paths from Plugin._migration.
design_decisions: Kept Plugin._migration as the Decky lifecycle hook.
Converted migration behavior to an explicit no-op log because SDH-ludusavi has no supported legacy template namespace.
Added a case-insensitive static guard so template scaffolding path remnants cannot return to main.py.
results: Full pytest suite passed with 318 tests.
